history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right. The goal is at row 04, column D. Directly in front of me is lava at (02, C). I need to go down and then right and then down again to reach the goal. I will turn clockwise to face down, then move forward, and then navigate around.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,B) facing down. The goal is at (4,D). The cell directly in front of me (3,B) is empty floor, so I should move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row03 column B facing down. The goal is at row04 column D. There is lava at row04 column C, so I cannot go directly right from row04. A safe path is to go east from my current position to row03 column C, then east to row03 column D, then down to the goal. To face east, I need to turn counter-clockwise from facing down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 3, column B, facing right (>). The cell directly ahead is row 3, column C, which is a floor cell (`.`). The goal is at row 4, column D. To reach the goal, I need to move forward twice to get to row 3, column D, then turn clockwise to face down and move to the goal. The next immediate safe step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column C, facing right. The cell directly ahead (row 03, column D) is empty floor, safe to move into. From there, I can then turn clockwise to face down and move to the goal at row 04, column D. So the next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column D facing right. The goal is directly below at row 04, column D. I cannot move forward because it's a wall. I need to rotate clockwise to face down, then move forward to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3 column D facing down. The goal is at row 4 column D directly in front of me. Moving forward will take me to the goal. No obstacles in front. So I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
